name: Aperio
description: Personal AI memory layer — Postgres + MCP + Claude

scripts.// 1 server & chat: ── boot the app (server or terminal client) in cloud/local/lite mode ──
scripts.start:lite: AI_PROVIDER=llamacpp PORT=31337 DB_BACKEND=sqlite EMBEDDING_PROVIDER=transformers IDLE_SHUTDOWN=on APERIO_LITE=on APERIO_CONFIG_PRECEDENCE=db node server.js
scripts.// 2 tests: dev: ── run once locally; test:only takes a --test-name-pattern arg ──
scripts.test: NODE_ENV=test node --test $([ -n "$APERIO_AGENT_RUN" ] && echo --test-reporter=./tests/reporters/quiet.js --test-reporter-destination=stdout) $(find tests/unit tests/integration tests/e2e -name '*.test.js' -print)
scripts.// 3 tests: ci: ── same suites, with json reporters for the results dashboards; test:ci also runs coverage ──
scripts.test:e2e:ci:dashboard: npm run test:e2e:ci && npm run e2e:dashboard
scripts.test:unit:ci: NODE_ENV=test node --test --test-concurrency=1 --test-reporter=$([ -n "$APERIO_AGENT_RUN" ] && echo ./tests/reporters/quiet.js || echo spec) --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter=./tests/reporters/unit-json.js --test-reporter-destination=tests/results/unit-results.json $(find tests/unit -name '*.test.js' -print)
scripts.test:unit:ci:dashboard: npm run test:unit:ci && npm run unit:dashboard
scripts.test:integration:ci:dashboard: npm run test:integration:ci && npm run integration:dashboard
scripts.test:ci: NODE_ENV=test c8 --clean --reporter=lcov --reporter=text node --test --test-concurrency=1 --test-reporter=$([ -n "$APERIO_AGENT_RUN" ] && echo ./tests/reporters/quiet.js || echo spec) --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter=./tests/reporters/ci-json.js --test-reporter-destination=tests/results/test-results.json $(find tests/unit tests/integration -name '*.test.js' -print)
scripts.test:ci:dashboard: npm run test:ci && npm run coverage:dashboard && npm run unit:dashboard -- --input tests/results/test-results.json && npm run integration:dashboard -- --input tests/results/test-results.json && npm run test:e2e:ci:dashboard
scripts.// 4 coverage & dashboards: ── render tests/results/*.json (from the ci scripts above) into HTML dashboards ──
scripts.// 5 config & env: ── keep lib/config.js, .env.example, docs/config-reference.md and locales in sync ──
scripts.// 6 database: ── apply migrations (Postgres by default, or the sqlite bootstrap) ──
scripts.// 7 benchmarking: ── measure local model / prompt-cache performance, outside the test suite ──
scripts.// 8 vm / install testing: ── exercise the installer end-to-end in disposable VMs/containers per OS ──
